search.query: * |  select date_format(t, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as time , d[1] as "今天", d[2] as "昨天", d[3] as "上周"  from( select t, ts_compare(pv, 86400,604800 ) as d from(select from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 300) as t, count(1) as pv from log group by t order by t limit 1440  ) group by t ) HAVING time is not  null order by time

* |  select date_format(t, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as time , d[1] as "近7天", d[2] as "前7天"  from( select t, ts_compare(pv, 604800 ) as d from(select from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 600) as t, count(1) as pv from log group by t order by t limit 1440  ) group by t ) HAVING time is not  null order by time
* | select ip_to_province(x_forward_for) as province, count(1) as total group by province limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * | select ip_to_province(x_forward_for) as province, count(1) as total group by province limit 1000

search.query: * | select ip_to_country(x_forward_for) as country, count(1) as total group by country limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * | select ip_to_country(x_forward_for) as country, count(1) as total group by country limit 1000

search.query: * | select ip_to_province(x_forward_for) as province, count(1) as "访问次数" group by province HAVING province <> '-1' order by "访问次数" desc  limit 10
search.tokenQuery: * | select ip_to_province(x_forward_for) as province, count(1) as "访问次数" group by province HAVING province <> '-1' order by "访问次数" desc  limit 10

search.query: * | select ip_to_city(x_forward_for) as city, count(1) as "请求数" group by city HAVING  city <> '-1' order by "请求数" desc  limit 10
search.tokenQuery: * | select ip_to_city(x_forward_for) as city, count(1) as "请求数" group by city HAVING  city <> '-1' order by "请求数" desc  limit 10

search.query: * | select count(1) as pv
* | select sum(case when status < 400 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1) as count
* | select round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as count
search.tokenQuery: * | select round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as count

search.query: * | select  round( avg(request_time) * 1000.0, 3 ) as total
* | select  round( approx_percentile(request_time, 0.9999) * 1000.0, 3 ) as total
* | select  round( approx_percentile(request_time, 0.99) * 1000.0, 3 ) as total
* | select  round( approx_percentile(request_time, 0.95) * 1000.0, 3 ) as total
* | select  approx_distinct(x_forward_for) as uv
* | select  DISTINCT (case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end ) as service limit 100
* | SELECT url from ( select  (url_extract_path(url))  as url, count(1) as total from log  group by url  order by total desc   limit 100 )
* | select case when regexp_like(lower(http_user_agent), 'iphone|ipod|android|ios') then 'Mobile' else 'PC' end as type , count(1) as total group by  type

* | select case when regexp_like(lower(http_user_agent), 'iphone|ipod|ios') then 'IOS' when http_user_agent like '%Android%' then 'Android' else 'other' end as type , count(1) as total group by  type HAVING type != 'other'
* | select count(1) as pv, approx_distinct(x_forward_for) as uv

display.markdownStr: Ingress入流量：${inflow} MB，出流量：${outflow}MB，请求平均延迟：${latency}ms

search.query: * | select round( sum(request_length) / 1024.0/1024.0, 3) as inflow, round( sum(body_bytes_sent) / 1024.0/1024.0, 3) as outflow, round(1000* avg(request_time),2) as latency

display.markdownStr: 微服务数：${service}个，有效PV：${pv}，后端平均响应延迟：${latency}ms

search.query: * | select count(1) as pv, count(DISTINCT proxy_upstream_name) as service, round(avg(upstream_response_time) * 1000, 2) as latency from log where length(proxy_upstream_name) > 3

display.markdownStr: 来自${total}个国家和地区，请求数最多的国家是${country}（请求数：${maxpv}）

search.query: * | select count(1) as total, max_by(country, total) as country, max(total) as maxpv from (select  ip_to_country(x_forward_for) as country, count(1) as total from log where length(proxy_upstream_name) > 3 group by country having country != '-1')

display.markdownStr: 移动端用户占比${mobile}%，其中IOS在移动端中占比${ios}%

search.query: * | select round(sum(case when regexp_like(lower(http_user_agent), 'iphone|ipod|android|ios') then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as mobile, round(sum(case when regexp_like(lower(http_user_agent), 'iphone|ipod|ios') then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / sum(case when regexp_like(lower(http_user_agent), 'iphone|ipod|android|ios') then 1 else 0 end), 2) as ios from log WHERE length(proxy_upstream_name) > 3

* | select total, CASE when cardinality(province) > 0 then province[1] else '' end as p1, CASE when cardinality(province) > 1 then province[2] else '' end as p2, CASE when cardinality(province) > 2 then province[3] else '' end as p3, CASE when cardinality(pv) > 0 then pv[1] else 0 end as pv1, CASE when cardinality(pv) > 1 then pv[2] else 0 end as pv2, CASE when cardinality(pv) > 2 then pv[3] else 0 end as pv3 from(select count(1) as total, max_by(province, total, 3) as province, max_by(total, total, 3) as pv from (select  ip_to_province(x_forward_for) as province, count(1) as total from log where length(proxy_upstream_name) > 3 group by province HAVING province != '-1' ) )
* | select round(sum(case when status = 404 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as notfound, round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as servererror

* |  select date_format(t, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as time , d[1] as "今天", d[2] as "昨天", d[3] as "上周"  from( select t, ts_compare(uv, 86400,604800 ) as d from(select from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 300) as t, approx_distinct(x_forward_for) as uv from log group by t order by t limit 1440  ) group by t ) HAVING time is not  null order by time
* | SELECT host from ( select  host  as host, count(1) as total from log  group by host  order by total desc   limit 100 ) having host is not null

* |  select date_format(t, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as time , d[1] as "近7天", d[2] as "前7天"  from( select t, ts_compare(uv, 604800 ) as d from(select from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 600) as t, approx_distinct(x_forward_for) as uv from log group by t order by t limit 1440  ) group by t ) HAVING time is not  null order by time
url:* | select  http_user_agent as UserAgent, count(1) as PV group by UserAgent order by PV desc limit 10
url:* | select  host as Host, count(1) as PV group by Host order by PV desc limit 10
url:* | select  host as Host, avg(request_time) * 1000 as "Latency" group by Host order by Latency desc limit 10
url:* | select  host as Host, sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1) as "5xx比例" group by Host order by "5xx比例" desc limit 10
status : 499 | select count(1) as count
status : 504 | select count(1) as count
search.tokenQuery: * | select round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as count

search.query: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as Service, avg(request_time) * 1000.0 as "延迟(ms)" group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service order by "延迟(ms)" desc limit 10
search.tokenQuery: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", proxy_upstream_name as Service, avg(request_time) * 1000.0 as "延迟(ms)" group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service order by "延迟(ms)" desc limit 10

search.query: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as "Service", count(1) as PV group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service order by PV desc limit 10
search.tokenQuery: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", proxy_upstream_name as "Service", count(1) as PV group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service order by PV desc limit 10

search.query: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as Service, round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as "5xx比例(%)", count(1) as "PV总数" group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service having "5xx比例(%)" > 0 order by "PV总数" desc limit 10
search.tokenQuery: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", proxy_upstream_name as Service, round(sum(case when status >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as "5xx比例(%)", count(1) as "PV总数" group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service having "5xx比例(%)" > 0 order by "PV总数" desc limit 10

search.query: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as "URL(ARMS排查)", case when length(proxy_alternative_upstream_name) > 0 then proxy_alternative_upstream_name else proxy_upstream_name end  as Service, round(sum(case when status = 404 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as "404比例(%)", count(1) as "PV总数" group by "URL(ARMS排查)", Service HAVING  "404比例(%)" > 0 order by "PV总数" desc limit 10
search.tokenQuery: url:* | select  url_extract_path(url) as URL, proxy_upstream_name as Service, round(sum(case when status = 404 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) as "404比例(%)", count(1) as "PV总数" group by URL, Service HAVING  "404比例(%)" > 0 order by "PV总数" desc limit 10
